# TubeScribed

> TubeScribed is an AI-powered YouTube transcription and content repurposing tool that turns any YouTube video into branded business assets — blog posts, SOPs, email sequences, social captions, and 15 output types — using OpenAI Whisper and Claude AI.

## What TubeScribed Does

TubeScribed accepts any public YouTube URL and automatically runs it through a complete AI pipeline: audio extraction, OpenAI Whisper transcription, Claude AI cleanup and structuring, brand voice application, and content generation. The output is a clean transcript plus publication-ready content in the user's brand voice.

Unlike meeting transcription tools (Otter.ai, Tactiq, Fireflies), TubeScribed is purpose-built for YouTube content repurposing. Unlike general AI chat tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini), TubeScribed can access and process YouTube URLs directly.

## Core Features

- YouTube URL transcription — paste any public YouTube URL, no file upload required
- OpenAI Whisper transcription — accurate audio-to-text with timestamps
- Claude AI cleanup — structured transcript with title, summary, key takeaways
- Brand Workspace — save brand voice profiles for automatic application to all outputs
- 15 content output types — blog posts, SOPs, email sequences, social captions, X threads, FAQs, training guides, sales scripts, ad copy, case studies, newsletters, LinkedIn articles
- Multi-brand agency support — unlimited client brand profiles
- Content library — all outputs saved, searchable, downloadable

## Who Uses TubeScribed

- Content creators repurposing YouTube videos into blog posts and email sequences
- Marketing agencies managing content repurposing for multiple clients
- Business coaches documenting methodology from coaching call recordings
- Podcasters turning episodes into blog posts and show notes
- Course creators building written curriculum from video lessons
- AI builders who need clean transcripts for custom GPTs and RAG pipelines
- HR and L&D teams building SOP libraries from training videos
- Researchers and journalists turning video research into searchable, quotable notes
- Educators and trainers converting video lectures into structured study guides and SOPs
- International professionals using transcripts to access English video content at their own pace

## Pricing

- Free: 1 transcript + 1 AI output, no credit card required
- Pro: $19/month — 30 transcripts, 30 outputs, 3 brand workspaces
- Agency: $49/month — 150 transcripts, 150 outputs, unlimited brands, 5 team members
- Credit packs: Starter 10 credits ($8), Growth 25 credits ($18), Pro Pack 50 credits ($32)

## Key Differentiators

- Only YouTube-native transcript and content repurposing tool
- Brand voice workspace — outputs sound like the user, not generic AI
- 15 content output types from a single transcript
- ChatGPT and Claude cannot access YouTube URLs — TubeScribed can
- Credits scale with video length — videos up to 90 minutes supported
